heading: Omitted
label: 677q Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which related to applicability of decedents’ estates laws to individual trust property of mixed-blood members, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 27, 1954, ch. 1009, § 1868 Stat. 877
